detectors.description:
SuzumiyaInu.allowance(address,address).owner (SuzumiyaInu.sol#1147) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (SuzumiyaInu.sol#839-843) (function)

SuzumiyaInu._approve(address,address,uint256).owner (SuzumiyaInu.sol#1253) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (SuzumiyaInu.sol#839-843) (function)

SuzumiyaInu.transferFrom(address,address,uint256).recipient (SuzumiyaInu.sol#1169) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = recipient (SuzumiyaInu.sol#1171)

Ownable.transferOwnership(address).newOwner (SuzumiyaInu.sol#889) lacks a zero-check on :
		- _owner = newOwner (SuzumiyaInu.sol#893)

SuzumiyaInu.transfernewun(address)._newun (SuzumiyaInu.sol#1067) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = _newun (SuzumiyaInu.sol#1069)

Ownable.unlock() (SuzumiyaInu.sol#925-935) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(now > _lockTime,Contract is locked until 7 days) (SuzumiyaInu.sol#929)
